rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §8.058 governs CDA training offered by regional education service centers and is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A regional education service center may offer to teachers employed by school districts the training required to be awarded a Child Development Associate (CDA) credential.
_note: Rule text concerns educator training; no bearing on homestead exemption valuation.
